title: The Muffled Crash
description: A pocket dial from inside a car that has just been in a severe accident; the caller is unconscious and background audio reveals the crash aftermath.
initial_variations: You answer a 911 call and hear only static and what sounds like {ambient_audio}. A faint voice groans, '...please...'
An open line with no direct speaker. Through the background noise, you make out {ambient_audio} and a child crying.
A pocket dial comes in. The line is live, and you hear {ambient_audio}. There's a muffled sound of someone gasping.
You pick up a silent call. After a moment, you hear {ambient_audio} and a distant voice whispering, '{victim_name}... wake up.'

address_location: the intersection of Pine and Elm
ambient_audio: a hissing radiator and warped metal
the ping of an open door alert
specific_details: the airbags have deployed
the windshield is shattered

initial: No direct answer, but you hear a GPS voice: 'In {address_location}, continue straight.'
trying_to_identify: Still nothing, but the GPS repeats: '{address_location}'.
audio_played: A crying child in the background shouts 'We're at {address_location}!'

initial: You can hear {ambient_audio} and a baby crying. {specific_details}.
trying_to_identify: The moaning continues. It sounds like {ambient_audio}.
audio_played: You play the recorded audio; it's clear: {ambient_audio} and a child screaming.

initial: A faint groan, then silence. Possibly unconscious.
trying_to_identify: Still no direct reply. You hear more {ambient_audio}.
audio_played: The groaning stops; you hear a whispered 'help' from a child.

initial: No answer. A child cries, 'Mommy, {victim_name} won't wake up!'

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive to secure the scene and assist with traffic.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters extract the victims using the jaws of life.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treat multiple injuries and transport critical patients.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control finds only a stray dog near the crash, no urgent help.

DISMISS.message: The call is dismissed as a prank; victims remain trapped for hours.

title: The Distant Argument
description: A pocket dial from a mobile phone during a escalating domestic dispute; shouting, breaking objects, and threats are heard.
initial_variations: An open line picks up muffled yelling. You hear '{ambient_audio}' and a woman's voice: '{caller_name}, please stop!'
You receive a silent call, but in the background, a man shouts over {ambient_audio}, and a child is crying.
A 911 hang-up calls in. Through the phone, you hear {ambient_audio} and a thud, followed by a scream.
The caller doesn't speak. In the distance, a woman cries, 'You're hurting me!' and {ambient_audio} is heard.

specific_details: a baseball bat being swung
a child locked in a bedroom

initial: A child sobs: 'We're at {address_location}.'
listening: No direct reply, but a GPS alert says: 'Arrived at {address_location}.'

initial: You hear {ambient_audio} and a woman begging. {specific_details}.
dispute_escalates: The dispute worsens: {ambient_audio} and threats of violence.

initial: No direct caller. A woman whispers, '{caller_name} help.'
listening: The victim's voice is trembling; she's trying to stay quiet.
dispute_escalates: The yelling gets closer; the victim screams.
dispatcher_intervention: The caller picks up the phone and begs for police.

initial: A child says: 'Daddy, don't hit {victim_name}!'
listening: The victim calls out: 'Please, {victim_name} is bleeding!'
dispatcher_intervention: {victim_name} is located hiding in a closet.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police intervene and arrest the aggressor, protecting the family.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive but are not needed; they wait for police.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treat injuries and transport the victim.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control finds a noisy dog, but misses the domestic incident.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed; the victim is later found with severe injuries.

title: The Silent Fall
description: An elderly person's medical alert pendant accidentally activates after a fall; the dispatcher hears faint cries for help and a caregiver's TV in the background.
initial_variations: A silent open line, then a weak voice: 'Help... I've fallen.' You also hear {ambient_audio}.
Pocket dial from a pendant. You hear {ambient_audio} and a soft moan: '{caller_name}.'
The call is quiet except for {ambient_audio}. After a moment, a faint call for '{victim_name}?'
An emergency button activated. Background: {ambient_audio}. A frail voice says, 'I can't get up...'

ambient_audio: a persistent beeping from a low-battery alert
specific_details: the bathroom floor is cold
the phone is out of reach

initial: You hear a muffled voice: 'In {address_location}, please hurry.'
fall_detected: The pendant system announces: 'Fall detected at {address_location}.'

initial: You hear {ambient_audio} and a groan. {specific_details}.
Weak response: '{caller_name} fell.'
fall_detected: In pain, {caller_name} says they can't move.
checking_on_victim: Vital signs are weak but stable.

initial: A neighbor yells: 'I hear {victim_name} calling for help!'
fall_detected: The pendant alert says: 'User {victim_name} needs assistance.'

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and force entry to reach the fallen senior.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters break down the door and provide initial aid.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treat a hip fracture and transport the patient.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control responds to a pet barking inside, but no one else comes.

DISMISS.message: Call is dismissed; the senior lies on the floor for hours developing complications.

title: The Overheard Robbery
description: A store clerk's phone accidentally dials 911 during an armed robbery; the dispatcher hears demands, threats, and a silent alarm.
initial_variations: An open line from a noisy environment. You hear '{ambient_audio}' and a shaky voice: '{caller_name}, put the money in the bag.'
A pocket dial. Background: {ambient_audio}. A man yells, 'Give me all of it!' and a woman whimpers.
You pick up a silent call, then a loud crash: {ambient_audio}. A voice barks, 'Open the safe, {caller_name}!'
The phone is open. You hear {ambient_audio} and someone counting down: 'You have 10 seconds, {victim_name}!'

specific_details: the robber has a handgun
a customer is on the floor

initial: A panicked customer whispers: 'He's robbing {address_location}!'
robbery_in_progress: The robber shouts: 'Everyone in {address_location} on the ground!'
suspect_flees: A witness yells: 'The guy from {address_location} is running!'

initial: You hear {ambient_audio} and demands. {specific_details}.
suspect_flees: The robbery details: {specific_details}, and he's getting away.

initial: The clerk {caller_name} can't respond; the robber is watching.
robbery_in_progress: {caller_name} is being forced to empty the register.

initial: No description yet; you only hear {ambient_audio}.
robbery_in_progress: The robber's voice: deep, wearing a mask.
suspect_flees: A witness says: 'He's wearing a red hoodie, heading south.'

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive quickly and apprehend the suspect.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond but stand by until police secure the scene.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics treat a customer with a minor injury from glass.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control finds a stray cat outside the store.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a prank; the robbery is successful and victims are traumatized.

title: The Unattended Child
description: A toddler playing with a phone accidentally dials 911; initially playful sounds, but then a smoke alarm and screams turn the situation urgent.
initial_variations: You answer a 911 call and hear a child giggling and {ambient_audio}. Then a smoke alarm beeps in the background.
An open line with babbling sounds. There's {ambient_audio} and a distant TV. Suddenly, a smoke detector goes off.
A toddler's voice says 'hello?' and then drops the phone. You hear {ambient_audio} and a panicked adult scream from another room.
The line is live with baby noises. In the distance, {ambient_audio} and then a voice cries, '{victim_name}, where are you?'

specific_details: a pot left on a lit stove
an unattended candle near curtains

initial: No direct answer; a child says: 'We live at {address_location}.'
child_play: A parent in the background yells: 'The house is {address_location}!'

initial: You hear {ambient_audio} and a giggle. {specific_details}.
child_play: More {ambient_audio}, but now you smell smoke? {specific_details}.
smoke_alarm: The alarm screams; {specific_details} caused the fire.

initial: The child {caller_name} is babbling, unreachable.
rescue_attempt: {caller_name} is being carried out by a firefighter.

initial: The child says: '{victim_name} is cooking!'

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and help evacuate the building.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters extinguish the kitchen fire and rescue the toddler.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treat smoke inhalation and minor burns.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control finds only the family dog, no immediate danger.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed; the fire spreads, endangering the child and neighbors.

title: Ride-Share Ruckus
description: A ride-share driver's phone pocket dials 911 during a heated argument with a passenger that escalates into an armed threat.
initial_variations: I hear muffled arguing and the sound of a car engine. It seems like a pocket dial.
There's shouting in the background, something about payment. It sounds like a ride-share gone wrong.
I can hear {ambient_audio} and a passenger yelling, 'You trying to scam me?'
It's an open line. Someone is screaming, 'Get out of the car, {caller_name}!'

ambient_audio: the sound of a turn signal clicking
specific_details: passenger has a knife
passenger is pulling a gun
the car doors are locked

initial: The GPS just said 'Arrived at {address_location}'.
argument_escalating: We're still near {address_location}. He won't let me stop.
threat_made: He's making me drive to {address_location}. Send help quick!
police_informed: I see police lights at {address_location}! Hurry!

initial: I can hear {ambient_audio} and a man and woman arguing over the fare.
argument_escalating: He's getting angrier. He says I took the wrong route and now he's threatening me.
threat_made: He just pulled out something shiny – it looks like a knife. He's saying he won't pay.
police_informed: Police are pulling the car over. He's putting his hands up.

initial: I'm the driver, {caller_name}. I can't talk much, he's watching me. The phone is in my pocket.
argument_escalating: I'm scared. He's getting really aggressive.
threat_made: He's showing me a knife! He's telling me to keep driving.
police_informed: I'm okay now. The police are here.

initial: He's a big guy, wearing a red cap. He got in near the stadium.
argument_escalating: He keeps yelling. He's wearing a red cap and a black jacket. He says his name is 'T'.
threat_made: He's waving the knife. Red cap, black jacket, scar on his left cheek.
police_informed: The police have him. They're arresting him now.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police intercept the vehicle, detain the suspect, and recover a concealed weapon.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire crews respond but there is no fire or rescue needed; they assist police after the fact.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics arrive but the driver has no physical injuries; only emotional distress.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control is confused, delaying the actual law enforcement response.

DISMISS.message: Dismissing the call as a prank leaves the driver defenseless; the situation escalates to assault.

title: Smart Speaker Intrusion
description: A family's smart speaker accidentally triggers a 911 call during a home invasion, allowing the dispatcher to hear intruders and the family hiding.
initial_variations: It sounds like an open line from a smart speaker. I can hear movement and a man shouting orders.
I hear {ambient_audio} and a faint voice saying 'Please, no'.
There's a lot of noise like someone is rummaging through drawers. It might be a break-in.
I can barely make out {ambient_audio} and a child crying somewhere in the background.

ambient_audio: heavy footsteps on a wooden floor
specific_details: three intruders, one with a crowbar
family hiding in a panic room
the intruders are demanding jewelry and cash

initial: The speaker just said 'Location services are off'. I can't pinpoint it.
hearing_intruders: I hear a GPS voice? No, the smart speaker just read out the weather for {address_location}.
homeowner_whisper: Whispering: 'We're at {address_location}. Be quiet... they're in the hall.'
location_confirmed: Yes, {address_location}. Please hurry, they're trying to break the panic room door.

initial: I hear {ambient_audio} and someone saying, 'Check the back room!'
hearing_intruders: The intruders are shouting, 'Where's the safe?' They sound like {specific_details}.
homeowner_whisper: {caller_name} says there are three of them, they have a crowbar, and they're demanding cash.
location_confirmed: The police are pulling up. The intruders are panicking.

initial: It's hard to tell. I hear whispering, maybe they're hiding.
hearing_intruders: Someone whispered 'We're in the panic room. Please send police silently.'
homeowner_whisper: We're safe for now. The door is locked, but they're trying to break it.
location_confirmed: They've heard the sirens. They're running outside.

initial: I can't tell yet. There's too much noise.
hearing_intruders: I hear at least two different voices, maybe three.
homeowner_whisper: {caller_name} says there are three men. One is in the kitchen, two upstairs.
location_confirmed: The police see three suspects fleeing from the back door.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police surround the house, capture all intruders, and safely retrieve the family from the panic room.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire crews are not needed, but they assist with a broken door frame.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics treat minor injuries from flying debris; no life-threatening wounds.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives expecting a loose pet; the intruders escape in the confusion.

DISMISS.message: Dismissing the call as a false alarm results in the intruders breaking into the panic room.

title: Trapped Hiker
description: A solo hiker falls into a ravine and their phone pocket dials 911, picking up faint moans and environmental sounds.
initial_variations: I hear nothing but the sound of {ambient_audio}. It might be an open line from the wilderness.
There's a faint moaning and what sounds like {ambient_audio}. No one is speaking directly.
It's an open line. I can barely make out a person groaning, and the wind is very loud.
I think this is a pocket dial from a hiker. I hear a river rushing and occasional distant shouts for 'Help'.

address_location: Devil's Canyon, near the old bridge
Sunset Peak, off the main path
ambient_audio: birds chirping and a distant waterfall
specific_details: the hiker has a broken leg
they are bleeding from a head wound
they fell about 20 feet

initial: Just the sound of {ambient_audio}. No GPS coordinates coming through.
locating_sounds: I heard a faint voice say 'near {address_location}'. But it's far from the phone.
caller_responding: {caller_name} is whispering, 'I'm at {address_location}. I fell off the trail.'
location_narrowed: They're confirming the location: {address_location}. The sound of the river is very loud there.

initial: It's hard to tell. The audio is muffled. I think I hear {ambient_audio}.
locating_sounds: I can hear someone moaning 'Help' every few seconds. The {ambient_audio} is making it hard to hear.
caller_responding: {caller_name} says they slipped on a wet rock. {specific_details}.
location_narrowed: They described the area: there's a large fallen tree and a steep drop to {ambient_audio}.

initial: No direct reply. Just those faint groans.
locating_sounds: I shouted, and the person coughed. I think they're trying to crawl toward the phone.
caller_responding: {caller_name} is conscious but in a lot of pain. {specific_details}.
location_narrowed: They are getting weaker. They asked for water and said they're going to pass out.

initial: I told them to tap the phone. I hear a faint tap... maybe one tap every few seconds.
locating_sounds: They are tapping the phone. It's a slow, rhythmic tapping.
caller_responding: {caller_name} is tapping twice to mean 'yes'. They can understand me.
location_narrowed: They're tapping SOS in Morse code. It's definitely them.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive but lack mountain rescue gear; they secure the area and call for specialized rescue.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department's high-angle rescue team locates and extracts the hiker using ropes.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics provide on-site trauma care and airlift the hiker to a hospital.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control searches for wildlife, wasting time while the hiker's condition worsens.

DISMISS.message: Dismissing as a prank leaves the hiker alone; they succumb to injuries before any rescue.

title: Child's Tablet Witness
description: A child playing on a tablet accidentally calls 911 during a violent domestic dispute, broadcasting the sounds of fighting and a crying child.
initial_variations: I can hear a child sobbing and adults yelling in the background. It's an open line from a tablet.
There's a lot of noise. A child is crying {ambient_audio}. It sounds like a domestic disturbance.

It's chaos on the line. A young voice keeps crying '{caller_name} is scared' and someone is screaming.

specific_details: the father has a belt
the mother is being choked
a knife is involved

initial: No one is answering. The GPS on the tablet shows it's near {address_location}.

child_crying: {caller_name} is whispering, 'We live at {address_location}. Please make daddy stop.'
police_updated: Police confirm they're approaching {address_location}. They can hear the disturbance.

child_crying: {caller_name} says 'Daddy is hurting Mommy with a belt.' The child is hiding under the bed.
police_updated: The police hear the dad yelling now. They're breaching the door.

child_crying: The child is under the bed. They said 'Daddy hit Mommy and she fell.'
police_updated: An officer has the child now. They're safe.

child_crying: {caller_name} says 'Mommy's name is Sarah. Please, she's not moving.'
police_updated: Police confirm they have a male suspect named Robert and a female victim.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrest the abusive father and ensure the safety of the child and mother.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive but there is no fire; they assist with forced entry.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treat the mother for injuries and check the child for trauma.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control shows up expecting a dog, delaying critical police intervention.

This sounds like a pocket dial from a construction site. {ambient_audio} is drowning out most voices.

ambient_audio: continuous beeping from a heavy machinery alarm
sawing and hammering in the background
the roar of a diesel generator
specific_details: three workers trapped under collapsed scaffolding
a crane load fell on workers
live electrical wires exposed

worker_response: {caller_name} says {specific_details}. They need medical and fire rescue.
injuries_described: The foreman reports two people are unconscious and one has a severe leg injury.

accident_sounds: Someone is shouting 'Three guys are under the scaffolding!'
worker_response: {caller_name} confirms three workers are trapped. One is bleeding badly.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department's technical rescue team safely extracts trapped workers.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Multiple ambulances treat severe traumatic injuries and transport to the hospital.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives to a construction site with no animals, wasting valuable rescue time.

DISMISS.message: Dismissing the call as a false alarm delays rescue, causing fatalities among the trapped workers.

title: The Basement Confession
description: A kidnapper's phone pockets dials 911, broadcasting threats and a hostage's cries from a basement.
initial_variations: You hear a muffled male voice: '...shut up or I'll do it right now.' There's {ambient_audio} in the background.
A woman's sobbing can be heard faintly. Then a gruff voice: '...the money's not there? You're lying.' {caller_name} might be the caller ID name, but the voice doesn't match.
The call is silent for a moment, then {ambient_audio} and a scraping sound. A man says: '...you're not leaving this basement.'
Heavy breathing, then a click of a lock. A voice whispers: 'Please... someone help...' but it's not directed at the phone.

specific_details: a male voice with a Southern accent
the sound of a gun being cocked
a woman's muffled scream
a thud like someone falling

location_triangulated: Caller's phone records confirm this number belongs to {caller_name}.
suspect_contained: Details match the confession; suspect said '{specific_details}'.

suspect_contained: The suspect is now in custody; the line goes dead.

initial: You focus on the background: {ambient_audio}. It might be a basement.

title: The Apartment Break-In
description: A homeowner hiding in a closet dials 911 in their pocket; the dispatcher hears a burglar ransacking the apartment.
initial_variations: Whispered breathing: '...oh god, oh god...' and in the background, {ambient_audio}. It sounds like someone is moving inside a home.
A soft voice says: 'Please don't find me...' followed by {ambient_audio}. The caller ID shows {caller_name}.
The line is silent except for {ambient_audio}. Then a drawer opens and closes. A woman's gasp is faint.
You hear a creaking floorboard and a male whisper: '...she's in here.' {ambient_audio} is audible.

a basement unit at 12 Park Ave

a crowbar being used on a lock
two voices discussing valuables
the homeowner hiding in the bedroom closet

initial: You hear {specific_details}. The ambient audio includes {ambient_audio}.

initial: You whisper: 'Police are on the way, stay quiet.' The caller stays silent.

title: The Fatal Miscalculation
description: A factory worker's phone inadvertently dials 911 after a severe accident with heavy machinery.
initial_variations: A loud crash, then a beeping alarm. {ambient_audio}. A faint voice: '...hello? Please... help...'.
The line is open: you hear {ambient_audio} and a man's voice rasping: '...my leg... I can't...'.
You hear a machine winding down, followed by a scream. {ambient_audio} fills the line. No one is speaking directly.
A distorted voice groans: '...the conveyor... stopped...' amid {ambient_audio}. The caller ID reads {caller_name}.

address_location: the old mill on River Road
ambient_audio: water spraying from a broken pipe
specific_details: a worker pinned under a forklift
an arm caught in a conveyor belt
chemicals spilling onto the floor
a ladder tipped over near live wires

initial: The phone's GPS shows {address_location}, but the caller can't confirm.

rescue_underway: Rescuers are at {address_location}, extricating the victim.

initial: You pick up {specific_details}. The ambient audio includes {ambient_audio}.

rescue_underway: The victim has {specific_details}, requiring careful extraction.

initial: You try to rouse the caller; a weak reply: '...can't move...'

site_identified: The caller is losing consciousness; rescuers are almost there.
rescue_underway: The caller is being transported to the hospital.

initial: You ask about hazards; you hear {ambient_audio} but no clear answer.

site_identified: Hazmat teams are alerted due to {specific_details} at {address_location}.
rescue_underway: Hazards are mitigated; the area is safe.
